title: Start Failed of the podman machine with hyperv virtualization after waking up from sleep
body:
### Bug description

Cannot start existing podman machine with hyperv after laptop was woken from sleep. Error: exit code 125

### Operating system

Windows 10

### Installation Method

Installer from website/GitHub releases

### Version

1.13.0

### Steps to reproduce

1. Create and start podman machine with hyperv provider
2. Do not stop 
3. Put PC into sleep
4. Wake it up
5. Start Podman desktop
6. Start up existing podman machine
7. Assert: Machine is up again and working
Actual result: Start failed: `Error: Illegal argument (key already exists) (32237)`

Workaround: Start the machine via HyperV manager

### Relevant log output

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I'm experiencing this error also. It will occur after reboot occasionally, not when waking the machine from sleep. It is the exact same error message though.

Experienced this when running the executable PD multiple times. It might also be connected to RAM issues because I couldn't start the machine in HyperV Manager either, with an "Unable to allocate RAM" error. Once I freed up the memory, I could start the machine again.
